title: TogglePVP
description: Just a "plugin" from Eeqzy that allows you to switch the PVP mode on the entire server!
body:
# TogglePVP
A simple plugin that allows you to quickly switch PVP mode without any problems. Versions 1.8 to 1.21.5 are supported. It is ideal for various local events. It will be improved in the future!

## Commands
- /pvp help
- /pvp on/off - Enables/disables PVP on the entire server

### Available commands
- /pvp      
- /tpvp        
- /togglepvp    

# Important
Only a player with operator rights can switch PVP!
